questions.question: Is x > 0? (1) x² = 4 (2) x = 2
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Both needed: x=±2, need sign. Answer: D.

questions.question: What is n? (1) 2n = 10 (2) n + 1 = 6
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Statement 1 alone: n=5. Answer: A.

questions.question: Is n even? (1) n divisible by 2 (2) n = 4k
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Statement 1 sufficient. Answer: A.

questions.question: Area of rectangle? (1) length 5 (2) width 3
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Both needed for area. Answer: C.

questions.question: Is a > b? (1) a − b = 1 (2) b − a = −1
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Either alone sufficient. Answer: D.

questions.question: Value of x+y? (1) x=3 (2) y=4
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Need both sums. Answer: C.

questions.question: Is triangle right? (1) sides 3,4,5 (2) angle 90°
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: 3-4-5 sufficient. Answer: A.

questions.question: Profit percent? (1) CP 100 (2) SP 120
questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Need both CP and SP. Answer: C.

questions.solution: Step 1: Test each statement. Step 2: Statement 1 sufficient. Answer: A.
